title: ICAI Reprimands CA for Gross Negligence in Invoice Verification
content:
# ICAI Reprimands CA for Gross Negligence in Invoice Verification

Ek important update hai professional conduct par! The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) ne ek Chartered Accountant (CA) ko reprimand kiya hai for failing to verify suspicious invoices. This action by the ICAI's Disciplinary Committee reiterates the critical importance of due diligence for every professional.

Here are the key details:

*   **CA Reprimanded:** CA Sanjeev Kumar Gandhi has been held guilty of professional misconduct.
*   **Reason for Reprimand:** The CA failed to verify the authenticity of invoices, specifically those issued by M/s Pooja International, whose Taxpayer Identification Number (TIN) was already cancelled before the transactions took place. This was deemed as gross negligence by the Disciplinary Committee.
*   **Penalty Imposed:** Along with the reprimand, a penalty of ₹1 Lakh has been imposed on the CA.
*   **Complainant:** The complaint against the auditor was filed by Shri Deepak Sethi, former promoter and director of Laycock Engineers Pvt. Ltd.

This decision highlights that auditors must exercise proper professional care and ensure that financial statements present a true and fair view, especially concerning the legitimacy of underlying transactions.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.icai.org/post.html?post_id=13284)

*Published on: 13 March 2026*
